description: ESA debris-mitigation reference rules (European practice reference; contractual for ESA missions, cited here as guidance). Research-grade snapshot; not legal advice.

rules.title: ESA space debris mitigation: LEO clearance reference (5-year class)
rules.source_reference: ESA Space Debris Mitigation Requirements, ESSB-ST-U-007, Issue 1 (30 October 2023)
rules.finding_if_fail: Design disposal lifetime exceeds the 5-year LEO clearance class used by the current ESA debris-mitigation requirements (reference for European practice).
rules.limitations: ESSB-ST-U-007 applies contractually to ESA-procured missions; it is cited here as a reference for where European practice is heading, not as a legal requirement on third parties. Clause-level applicability requires review.

rules.title: Zero Debris alignment statement (voluntary charter)
rules.authority: European Space Agency and Zero Debris community
rules.finding_if_fail: No Zero Debris alignment statement is declared (informational: the charter is voluntary; an ADR evidence package benefits from stating its position).
rules.limitations: Voluntary charter, not a legal requirement. Informational finding only.
